finding_results.evidence: Faye's motive at chapters/chapter_04.md:290-294 now arrives through a false start ('Which is I'm not—'), fragmented facts ('She knew my face. Said she'd seen me on Ganymede'), a trailing-off ('Same name. Same—'), a physical break, and the raw unguarded 'I was ice' before a rougher desire statement — no longer a clean self-summary paragraph. Ed's entry at chapters/chapter_04.md:308-312 is now an unsolicited interruption ('Also it's a chase,' Ed said. Nobody had asked.) with Jet trying to redirect ('Ed—') rather than a formally queued turn ('Ed has a reason' / 'Sure. Why not.'). Jet's motive at chapters/chapter_04.md:334-340 now starts with a logistics deflection ('Because we lose the trail if we sit here'), gets called out by Spike ('That's logistics. Not a reason.'), then arrives through a started-and-stopped admission ('Somebody used a dead informant's code path to—' He stopped.) followed by a controlled restart ('There's a bounty on me that shouldn't exist. It came through dead channels. That doesn't happen by itself.'). Faye's reaction is a silent head turn rather than a pointed echo. Spike's motive at chapters/chapter_04.md:300-306 remains terse with Jet inferring and Spike confirming incompletely ('That's not all of it.' / 'No.').
finding_results.notes: Roughened Faye and Jet (the two cleanest self-summaries) so motives must be inferred from messy pressured speech. De-formalized Ed's queue entry into an interruption. Spike's already-terse non-denial left intact. The four-consecutive-motive-speech cadence is broken: Faye gives fragments and trailing-off, Spike gives terse non-denial, Ed interrupts without invitation, Jet deflects before a self-correcting partial admission. All four reasons remain legible for the reader but none arrive as clean declarations.

summary: Revised the bridge motive-reveal sequence (lines 288-340) to break the four-consecutive-clean-motive-speech pattern identified by the finding. Faye's Ganymede reveal was roughened from a composed paragraph into fragmented delivery with false starts and trailing-off. Ed's formal queue entry was replaced with an unsolicited interruption. Jet's confessional was restructured through a logistics deflection, Spike's pushback, and a started-and-stopped self-correction before a controlled restart. Spike's already-terse exchange was preserved. All motives remain narratively legible but now arrive through pressure, mess, and inference rather than arranged declaration.
